data: Ideally played from a win streak with lots of resources, an augment / situation that guarantees Vex (ex: Aura Farming), or transition from Leblanc "Dark Magician Girls" comp.
Play a standard win streak board ideally with an econ engine online such as Timebreaker or Primordian. Take econ augments if you can.
Continue leveling and win streaking. Look for upgraded 2 and 3 cost units to hold items. Vanguards and Shepherds into LeBlanc is a good core to play towards.
If far ahead in HP / win streaking, you can sac Stage 4 to get to 9. Otherwise, roll on 8 to stabilize first. At 9, always prioritize itemizing whichever upgraded units you hit first.

-1 tier in strength without Emblem. Always selector the NOVA Emblem unit - can be on Yi, Fiora, or Graves 2. Aatrox provides team Sunder/Shred. If no emblem, just play 4 Nova instead if you hit the frontline (TK + Shen).
Look for an econ engine like Primordian or Timebreaker. Slam items on Bel'Veth or Akali as an item holder.
Standard level 6 and 7 intervals (3-2 / 3-5 if streaking). Play around Brawler / NOVA frontline. Kindred 1 can go in immediately.
Level to 8 at a natural interval and roll until Kindred 2 / Tahm 2. Once stable, push levels for 5 costs.
Always keep everything in Mecha form. Can play Kench + Fiora/Yi instead of the N.O.V.A units (usually only with early kench 2). Strong with Yasuo god blessing hexes.
Look for an econ engine: Timebreaker > Primordian > Arbiter. Early Urgot and Viktor can hold items too.
Standard level 6 and 7 intervals (3-2 / 3-5 if streaking). Play around Brawler and Voyager. Always play Asol and transfer items.
Level to 8 and look for upgraded Mecha units. Don't push for 9 until you hit 2* since they are worth 2 slots. Bard > Karma for final slot.
Best played with Drone Uplink Psionic item on Viktor (-1 tier in strength without). Conduit mode on Miss Fortune. Rhaast usually contested so don't feel the need to chase him.
Ideally open with one of the 3-cost Conduits to itemize. Look for an econ engine: Timebreaker > Arbiter > Primordian. Slam items for Viktor>
If lose streaking, level to 7 at 3-5 and roll for 2* item holders. Win last two fights of Stage and econ up. If win streaking, you can aim to Level 7 end of Stage.
Slow roll for 3* 3 cost. You should be hitting one by end of Stage 4. If you think you can't hit, take an econ augment. Once done, level to 8 for Bard / Conduit.

Slow roll on 5. Then once you hit Reksai or Briar 3 + you're close to the other, level to 6 and roll for Belveth and the board. NOVA Maokai as your default option but you can NOVA Akali if you need anti-heal. NOVA Caitlyn is also an option if you need more damage.
Field 3 Primordian and begin collecting copies of all Primordian units. Build items for Bel'Veth. You can also greed TImebreaker if you have it.
Slow roll on 5 for Primordian units. If you hit a 3* 1 cost and are close to the other, roll on 6 instead. Once you finish Bel'Veth 3 start pushing levels for NOVA.
Rush level 8 for 5 NOVA and look for Kindred as your duo carry. If are very rich with lots of items, you can also go for Akali 3 as another carry.

Best with Arbiter that scales Leblanc's AP or 50 mana spent gain Permanent HP. Other Arbiter buffs are still being figured out at the moment. End game you can cap your board with Vex who holds Leblanc's items.
Play around early Arbiters with Zoe as the item holder. You can also play around Teemo and Nasus too. Slam items for Leblanc > Tank.
Look for 4 Vanguard and 3 Shepherd as your core. Leblanc 1 is strong and can immediately be played if you high roll her early.
Level to 8 and roll for Leblanc 2, Nunu 2, and Karma. If needed, you can flex around other 3 costs such as Aurora or Viktor. Once stable, push to 9.

Dishsoap Pro Tip: Anima is best played as lose streak cashout -> 4 cost, but this reroll version also can win. Best played with Soraka +HP God blessings. Take any good cashout right before or after stage 3 minion round. Take econ Arbiter or early scaling max health if you have early Diana. Can drop Leona for Nunu 2. If Arbiter isn't great, leftover items on Jinx 3 > LeBlanc 2 > Jinx 2.
Ideally open with Anima to begin lose streak. Be careful about slamming items and being too strong. Position poorly if needed to guarantee losses.
Aim for 300-400 minimum cash out. Level to 7 and roll for 2* 3 costs. Aim to stabilize with at least 2 lives. If you need time to transition, roll during PvE rounds.
Slow roll for 3* 3 cost. You should be hitting one by end of Stage 4. If you think you can't hit, take an econ augment. Once done, level to 8 for any 5 cost.

Rogue Emblem enables this comp heavily, but not necessary. Karma on 8. Fizz items are quite important but it's still Kaisa primary carry. Ornn and Rhaast are both heavily contested often so adapt your primary tank to whoever you are likely to hit.
Ideally open with one of the 3-cost Rogues to itemize. Look for an econ engine: Timebreaker > Primordian. Slam items for Kaisa / Fizz.
Slow roll for 3* 3 cost. You should be hitting one by end of Stage 4. If you think you can't hit, take an econ augment. Once done, level to 8 for Karma.

Much stronger with Space Groove Emblem (-1 tier in strength without). Space Groove emblem = cut Nasus for Nunu. Leftover items on Riven. Use Blitzcrank to displace the enemy primary tank so Riven can potentially wrap backline.
Play around upgraded Teemo and Nasus opener. Slam items on Teemo for Nami. Tank items on Nasus are also important.
Add more Space Groove as you get them. Mix in Vanguards, Shepherd, Dark Star, as needed. Save econ and get ready for level 8 rolldown.
Level to 8 and roll down for Nami 2, Riven, and 5 Space Groove. Look for either Kench 2 (best) or Rammus 2 or Nunu 2 as your frontline.

Use Timebreaker to push levels. Riven items are flexible. You can play 7 Meeple temporarily to finish important upgrades if needed. Fateweavers can inherently crit, but IE is still acceptable on Corki if your items end up that way.
Play for a win streak around Meeple or an Econ engine like Timebreaker. Slam items for Corki / Riven.
Level for more frontline / Meeple as needed. Keep in Timebreaker if possible to farm resources. Finish your tank items before prioritizing full Corki + RIven items.
Level to 8 and roll for Corki 2, Rammus 2, and Riven. 5/7 Meeple are flexible depending on if you hit strong 5 costs. Once stable, push for level 9.
Only play from high HP win streak positions. Graves is the ideal flex unit if you get it early, but Vex, Sona, and Fiora are fine too. Emblems are solid to flex in more traits.
Play for win streak, ideally with Timebreaker but that will be rare because units are weaker on average. Slam items aggressively.
If win streaking, prioritize playing strongest board over greeding econ traits. Upgraded 2 and 3 costs are often better than 1* high tier units here.
If very healthy, go to 8 and roll minimally to preserve HP / sac to level 9. If mid HP, roll a good amount to stabilize before pushing to 9 in Stage 5+.

Best on Medallion > Serpent = Boar > Altar Stargazer. Always aim for 4 Fateweaver. Always tank Jax even if you have Jax 2 + Aatrox 3. Talon 3 is luxury but strong if itemized specifically with the build shown. Otherwise, just TG will do.
Don't level early at all. Play around early Twisted Fate or Caitlyn carry. Focus on finishing 1 carry items instead of spreading out 1 item each.
Slow roll above 50g for Twisted Fate, Caitlyn, Aatrox, and Jax. Tank whoever you are likely to 3* first. Riven can also flex in as needed.
Finish your 3* then level for the 4 costs. It's likely you can't get BIS on one of your carries so don't overgreed since you aren't likely to win out anyways.

Best on Serpent  Constellation. Frontline tank is flexible: Jax 3 > Aatrox 3 > Poppy 3 (ideally paired with Rammus late). Composition requires many items that are similar so taking Gods that give extra components or item fixing is good.
Don't level early at all. Play around early Talon or Twisted Fate carry. Focus on finishing 1 carry items instead of spreading out 1 item each.
Slow roll above 50g for Talon, Twisted Fate, Aatrox, and Jax. Tank whoever you are likely to 3* first. Riven can also flex in as needed.
Play when you have lots of early copies of Teemo / Leona. Always aim for 6 Vanguard. Preferably choose a tanky Arbiter trait. Nasus 3 is nice, but not necessary.
Don't level early at all. Play around early Teemo 2 and Leona. If you're lose streaking, you can play an econ engine.
Slow roll for Teemo 3 and Leona 3. Nasus 3 is luxury. Aim for 4 Vanguard and 3 Shepherd. If behind, consider taking an econ God blessing to hit faster.
Finish your 3* and push levels for 6 Vanguard. You can flex in 5 Space Groove, Zoe, or a support 5 cost until you hit Blitzcrank.
Replicator mode on Miss Fortune, Shen on 8. Rhaast usually contested so don't feel the need to chase him.
Ideally open with one of the 3-cost Conduits to itemize. Look for an econ engine: Timebreaker > Primordian. Slam items for MF / Riven.
Only Play with the Mountain Stargazer constellation. Prioritize Xayah items first. Riven is flexible as AD / AP as long as you are consistent with the damage type.
Always keep at least 3 Stargazer in for the Emblem. Look for a Rageblade start on Twisted Fate 2 or Riven items on Talon 2.
Add more Stargazers as you level. Tech in Timebreaker when you can. The 1 cost carries fall off by end of Stage 3 so expect losses or transition to higher tier carries.
Level to 8 and roll for Riven, Nunu, and Xayah. Always play Shen. Once you hit at least 2 of the 3 units, you can consider pushing to 9.
Play with AD Psionic Item only. Very strong with bronze for life or little buddies augments. Rogue/Psionic emblem are great as well to drop low value units like Gragas, Akali, and Gwen.
Look for an econ engine: Primordian > Timebreaker. Slam items for Yi or tank. Put items on Briar until you get Belveth 2 from Primordian.
Standard level 6 and 7 intervals (3-2 / 3-5 if streaking). Play around Brawler frontline. Yi 1 can go in immediately if frontline is upgraded and itemized.
Level to 8 at a natural interval and roll until stable. Kench will drop tailored units so it's possible to stay high gold until oracle procs to wait for upgrades.
DO NOT REROLL VEIGAR AT LOW LEVELS. Best with Boar or Serpent Stargazer. Instead, push for 7 Meeple to print Veigar 3. Then move dowen to 5 Meeple for the board once you finish 3* Veigar.
Play around early Veigar 2 with slammed AP items for win streak. Look for Timebreaker if possible as well for an econ engine.
Don't reroll for Veigar unless you are extremely close (7-8 copies) before leveling. Level for more Meeples. Rush 7 if you highroll so you can print Veigar.
Print Veigar 3 and look for Rammus 2. Corki can hold AD items, but if you highroll Bard you can play around Conduit instead.

Play on Huntress, Fountain, or Medallion Stargazer. If on Medallion, Lulu still prints gold on casts even if Stargazer is not active. Your tank will likely change every game depending on what's available / contested.
Ideally open with early Lulu to itemize. Look for an econ engine: Timebreaker > Primordian. Slam items for Lulu / tank.
Slow roll for 3* Lulu. You should be hitting end of Stage 4. If you think you can't hit, take an econ augment. Once done, level to 8 for 5 costs.
Good with Emblems (Sniper, Space Groove, Stargazer). Can play Gnar and Rammus over Xayah and Jax. Meepsie does a lot of knockups but is less needed in stargazer version.
Ideally open with early Samira / Ornn to itemize. Look for an econ engine: Timebreaker > Primordian. Slam items for Samira / Ornn.

Yasuo God Hex buffs can be very good for Cho'Gath. Focus on building out 1 full set of backline items for Ezreal / Lissandra before building the other (aka don't build 1 item each). Ezreal 3 permanently scales with takedowns so killing units early is good. Timebreaker emblem is worth for 4 Timebreaker.
Don't level early at all. Play around early Cho'Gath and a 1 cost carry. Focus on finishing 1 full carry item set + Cho'Gath tank items before working on duo carry.
Slow roll above 50g for Ezreal, Lissandra, and Cho'Gath. Play any sniper for Ezreal if you primary carry him. Riven can also flex in as needed if you highroll her.
Finish your 3* then level for 4 Brawler and Xayah. It's likely you can't get BIS on one of your carries so don't overgreed since you aren't likely to win out anyways.
Two Much Value comp mainly. Position Pyke opposite side of enemy carry.
Nova Selector on Akali also provides Wounding (anti-heal). If Maokai 3 is very contested, tank Gragas or Aatrox 3 instead.
Look for an econ engine: Primordian > Timebreaker. Slam items for Akali. Use Primordian to generate Akalis.
Level to 6 and roll for Akali 3 with 3 Primordian still in. Always play 5 NOVA if you higroll early Kindred. Once you finish Akali / tank items, make Kindred or Yi items.
Finish your 3* and push levels for 5 NOVA. Tank Gragas 3 until you find Maokai 3. Look for Yi 2 or Kindred 2 as your duo carry.
For Arbiter selection, take either Mana Spent -> Shield for Leona > Copies of Leona > AP.
Ideally play around early Zoe and Leona and win streak. Slam items on Zoe and Leona as you get them.
Level to 6 and roll for 4 Vanguard + 3 Shepherd. You can also play 3 Arbiter with Diana temporarily. If you find Leona 3 early, tank her until Morde 3.
Finish your 3* then level for the 4 costs. LeBlanc with items caps your board until you hit Vex.

This is a comp you can't aim for unless you somehow know you're guaranteed Graves. Must convert Graves to a Fighter. Best upgrades in general are unknown at the moment, but most default to Meltthrough -> Grav Booster. Must aim to hit by Stage 4.
Play a standard win streak AD opener with slammed items related to Graves / Vex. Most commonly you will be angling Master Yi, Leblanc, or Jhin.
Continue playing best board. If you get Graves somehow this stage, pivot item resources immediately towards him and focus on good frontline.
Find graves and get any upgraded frontline (Bastion / Vanguard / Brawler / Voyager). If you can't find the 4 costs, you can also play 3 cost tanks.

Best played with Soraka +HP God blessings. Situational Fast 9 comp you pivot to when you hit Bronze For Life or have reason to play many synergies. Ideally played with a strong Anima lose streak cash out. If no Bronze for Life, drop Poppy for Shen.
Push the limit and go for 500+ cash out because you can get Fiora 2 with items. BUT make sure to have at least 2 lives. If you need time to transition, roll during PvE rounds.
If successful, you should be so strong on Stage 4, you don't need to roll much and can push directly to 9. However, be careful because level 8 players may take your 4 cost tanks.
Situational comp played with Invader Zed augment. Your duo carry is very flexible since Zed has no traits. Can play Rammus / Gnar until you find Shen and Bard.
Play a standard win streak tempo opener. You can't aim to play this comp unless you specifically hit Zed's augments.
Build Zed items ASAP: Edge of Night > Shojin. Slam items on anyone to preserve HP while focusing on econ. We will be rolling hard on level 8.
Level to 8 and look for a 4 cost tank. Zed has no traits so be very flexible with front line / back line. Some ideas: 4 Vanguard + Zed, 5 NOVA + Zed, or any comp that plays Riven / Yi.
Transform 3* Urgot only. 6 Mecha is bait unless you can get to level 9 / itemize all Mechas.
Pyke can also duo carry if you get 3* with AD Fighter items. Karma BIS is listed but you'll likely play whatever leftover AP items you can make.
Get Meepsie online with items ASAP and try to win streak if possible. If lose streak, you can look for an econ engine like Primordian / Timebreaker.
Level to 6 and roll for 2* Meepsie and activate her traits (Meeple > Voyager > Shepherd priority). Econ back up to 50g and slow roll for 3* Meepsie.
Finish Meepsie 3* and push levels. Once you finish Meepsie + tank items, build duo carry items for Karma / Sona.
Always aim for 6 Vanguard. If you can't hit Teemo 3, push levels for Leblanc instead. Preferably choose a tanky Arbiter trait. If you have Space Groove emblem, you can drop Leblanc for Nami.
Prioritize Nasus BIS and aim for a win streak if possible while farming kills for his permanent scaling. Aim for a Vanguard / Space Groove mix of units.
Slow roll for Nasus 3. Leona 3 and Teemo 3 are luxury. If you highroll Leblanc early and are behind in Teemo count, consider carrying her instead.
If you don't have good Psionic item, replace with Edge of Night. Comp is flexible with number of Voyagers. Gragas 3 is not necessary since Brawler can be hard to fit unless you hit Tahm Kench.
Get Pyke online with items ASAP and try to win streak if possible. If lose streak, you can look for an econ engine like Primordian / Timebreaker.
Level to 6 and roll for 2* Pyke and Gragas 2*. Econ back up to 50g and slow roll for 3* Pyke. Flex in Voyagers and Brawlers as needed.
Finish your 3* then push levels for 4 Psionic and Voyagers. If you have Gragas 3, always play 2 Brawler. Sona / Karma with items cap the board.
Ideally played on 3* buff Stargazer. Always NOVA select Aatrox. Once you finish your core, push levels for NOVA or more Stargazer. NOVA provides Shred/Sunder built into trait.
Prioritize Aatrox BIS and aim for a win streak if possible, but don't level early. Aim for a NOVA + Stargazer setup.
Slow roll for Aatrox 3 and the other 1 costs. You often can't roll for every 3* at the same time due to bench space so prioritize units you can itemize.
Finish your 3* and push levels for 5 NOVA. Depending on what Stargazer you have, you can also flex in other Stargazers / 5 costs as needed.
Very bad right now but it's a funny comp. Always play 6 Bastion. Aatrox provides Sunder with NOVA.
Get Poppy online with items ASAP and try to win streak if possible. If lose streak, you can look for an econ engine like Primordian / Timebreaker.
Slow roll for 3* Poppy, Caitlyn and Aatrox. If Aatrox is contested, consider tanking Jax / Ornn 2 until Rammus. If Caitlyn 3 is contested, build secondary items for Corki.
Finish your 3* and push levels for 6 Bastion. Always play Shen to buff Poppy. Corki can reposition but don't always greed.

Best on 3* buff Stargazer Constellation. Take lots of item and econ augments to hit the board. Many games you won't be able to fully itemize both TF and Caitlyn in the back so only prioritize one of them.
Reach for the Stars Jax Reroll
Get Jax online with items ASAP and try to win streak if possible. If lose streak, you can look for an econ engine like Primordian / Timebreaker.
Level to 6 and roll for 2* Jax and the Stargazer NOVA board. Econ back up to 50g and slow roll for 3* Jax. Finish any 3* you can, but often you can't chase all of them at the same time.
If playing on Medallion Stargazer you could justify staying lower level to hit other things like Gwen 3 / Talon 3. Rhaast goes in on 7. Can also play 4 Bastion on 8.
For flex slots, Graves is best if early, but Vex, Sona, and Fiora are fine too, if you have an emblem consider using this slot to flex that trait as well.
This comp aims for Top 4 so roll aggressively. Use Nova selector on kindred, if you have a Nova emblem, drop Cait and play a flex 5 cost. You don't need to build sunder or precision with Nova either.
Look for an econ engine like Primordian or Timebreaker. Slam items on Caitlyn as an item holder for Kindred.

Best with Arbiter that scales Leblanc's AP. Late game, if your Arbiter is not good cap with Blitzcrank over Leona. Comp can use strong frontline emblems such as Vanguard, Voyager, or Arbiter Emblems. Play Mighty mech over Karma on level 8 if you find sona for 7 Shepherd, frontline is most important.
Play around early Arbiter opener, preferably one that scales AP. If you take econ Arbiter, ditch it late game for a better tank option. Always take Frying Pan when possible.
Level for 5 Shepherd when possible with Vanguards. Focus on econ management while preserving HP because we will roll heavily on level 8.
Level and roll for 5 Shepherd + Vanguard frontline. If you don't hit Sona and you have strong AP Arbiter, keep Zoe in. Otherwise, flex in a duo carry like Karma or Bard.
Can play 7 Meeple with Emblem or flex down to 3 Meeple / 2 Bastion if you don't hit the legendaries.

This comp has 4 true flex slots from levels 7-10. Typically, play 4 replicator until you hit strong 5 costs like Morgana, Shen, or Graves. Rhaast can always flex in too. Emblems are strong and flexible in this comp as well.
Play around upgraded Twisted fate with timebreaker. Slam items on TF for Nami. Tank items on Jax/panth are also important.
Try to fill out your traits like Stargazer, Brawler, and Bastion while saving timebreaker rolls for your level 8 rolldown.
Best played with Bronze 4 Life augment.
Stargazer package and Tahm Kench are flex spots. Emblems are good for this composition even if you don't have 2+ Dark Star Emblems.
Look for an econ engine like Primordian or Timebreaker that fit in Dark Star naturally. Slam items for Karma / Jhin and push levels.
Level for more frontline / Dark Star as needed. 6 Dark Star is the big spike if you have emblem. You can flex in Voyager and Psionic easily too.
Level to 8 and roll down for 6 Dark Star. Always play Jhin ASAP. If Nunu is hard to hit, tank TK instead and don't prioritize Stargazers.

Only play this with Bronze for Life. Look for Bard + Rammus 2 on 8 or going fast 9 with natural Leblanc. You can also drop Leblanc for Sona if you don't have attack speed items. However, even without Arbiter Leblanc is our best carry. If you don't have BFL, play Shen over Ornn.
Level to 8 and roll for Leblanc Karma and frontline. If you hit Nunu 2 with good Arbiter play Vanguard version until you can find Rammus 2 and Bard. Rhaast on 9,
Dark Magician Girls: Bronze for Life
